title: デビュー戦の後に・出立、悠々と

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is overcome with emotion
following her debut race, having taken a step
toward conquering the Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning the race would honor her grandparents
and earn her accolades as a stayer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stirs with motivation, ready to further
improve her skills with the time she has remaining
until spring.
